{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323034517420FD8AFE00B4C222756"}"},"total":1554},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7060421706892149543","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常不错的一本书，设定很新颖，人物性格也很丰富，在角色和内容上的刻画也很不错，剧情还可以，可以尝试写一下玩家线，两线交融，以玩家线衬托主线，希望作者努力更新，保质保量"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1643882533,"group_id":"7048870813755247647","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"路边摆烂闲鱼一条……","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9f4lRoWBH0Szxg6ihsXp/FVQktU9C26f6b5bPyv/FAt","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/6aa3637139f440208920b77292e5dd6b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795406&x-signature=g5pIzJhoo30VH6eZjYXBZub7okA%3D","user_id":"4371290920326941","user_name":"万物以嘉"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4371290920326941","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1730488384,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7048870813755247647","book_info":{"abstract":"苏良穿越成为了魔族的一员，意外得知十日后，玩家即将降临！
面对即将到来的第四天灾，你该怎么做？
【第四天灾降临模拟器已经开启！】
每天，苏良都可以从模拟之中，带回一项天赋技能，永久固化己身，并且带入下一次模拟。
当十日后，玩家降临。
【您是否选择以下天赋开始模拟？】
【鲜血魔井（金色），超凡邪力（金色），死亡惊喜（金色）……】
玩家的确来了。
但是我……
也已经无敌了！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/998fa62d882308904cadbc39d7aa6dc4~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"一条蹦蹦龙","author_id":"","book_id":"7048870813755247647","book_name":"亿次模拟：拥有神级天赋的我无敌","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#402018","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1867人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":855,"name":"第四天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=855&name=第四天灾&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7048871363930489382","read_count":"1867","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1081419"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.5","serial_count":"509","tags":"游戏体育,穿越,无敌,魂穿,第四天灾","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/00546a06b341c7f39efb697744c704f4~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779392717&x-signature=tkV0ANbpUvEocmF5EQ2TRaANevg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1583727074353683","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.0545193e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323034517420FD8AFE00B4C222756"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":10545,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":256},"user_action":{"a
